name: PayFast
description: South African online payment gateway with plugins for WooCommerce, Magento, Shopify and REST API integration.

seo.title: PayFast — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: PayFast: South African online payment gateway with plugins for WooCommerce, Magento, Shopify and REST API integration.

when_to_use: Accepting South African cards and EFT via WooCommerce plugin
Embedding PayFast REST API for custom South African checkout
Recurring billing for South African subscription merchants

cons: Owned by Network International, less neutral
Fee structure can surprise small merchants
review.verdict: Default pick for South African e-commerce thanks to plugin breadth, though API feels dated vs modern rivals.
review.best_for: South African WooCommerce and Shopify stores wanting plug-and-play checkout
review.not_for: API-first teams expecting modern Stripe-level developer ergonomics

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
